Team

We are looking for new PhD students, Postdocs, and Master students to join the team (see openings) !

PI

Dr. Ilaria Colazzo

Postdoctoral Research Fellow, University of Exeter

  • (2021- ) Postdoctoral Research Fellow, University of Exeter, Exeter, UK
  • (2019-2021) Postdoctoral Researcher in Mathematics, Vrije Universiteit Brussel, Brussels, Belgium
  • (2017-2018) Postdoctoral Researcher in Mathematics
    University of Salento
  • (2017) Ph.D., Mathematics and Informatics
    University of Salento and University of Basilicata, Lecce, Italy
  • (2012) M.S., Mathematics
    University of Salento, Lecce, Italy
  • (2009) B.S., Mathematics
    University of Salento, Lecce, Italy
